suppress.notes: file name: ejs:3.1.10 This vulnerability (CVE-2023-29827) is disputed and has no patch. EJS is only used as a build-time dependency in this project via react-scripts and is not running in a production server environment where untrusted data could be parsed.
file name: bootstrap.min.js Bootstrap 3.4.1 is bundled inside Django REST Framework for its Browsable API feature. The Browsable API has been explicitly disabled, so this is not exploitable.
file name: bootstrap.min.js Bootstrap 3.4.1 is bundled inside Django REST Framework for its Browsable API feature. The Browsable API has been explicitly disabled, so this is not exploitable.
file name: bootstrap.min.js Bootstrap 3.4.1 is bundled inside Django REST Framework for its Browsable API feature. The Browsable API has been explicitly disabled, so this is not exploitable.
suppress.vulnerabilityName: Bootstrap before 4.0.0 is end-of-life and no longer maintained.
